what_it_does: This file is a metadata attachment record that declares a link between a channel-memory entry in the dragnet-development channel and a board item identified by board://item-d6cdf466, with a creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter only; no body content
target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-d6cdf466
standouts: The target is an opaque board://item-d6cdf466 URI
File contains only linkage metadata and a timestamp
conventions: Follows the channel-memory attachment schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Uses YAML frontmatter in a Markdown file
concerns: No human-readable label or title for the linked board item
No indication of why the attachment was created or by whom
Target URI cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: This is a bare linkage record connecting a dragnet-development channel attachment to board item d6cdf466, captured at 2026-06-24.
questions: What does board item d6cdf466 represent?
Which message or content in the channel is being attached?
Who added this attachment and for what reason?
Is the target URI resolvable elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be an attachment record and it does record an attachment relationship, so purpose and content align.
apparent_themes: Cross-referencing channel activity with board items
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist the fact that a channel-memory attachment relates to a specific board item, enabling traceability between discussion artifacts and board artifacts.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme as the target value in an attachment record.
contribution: It contributes the exact attachment id, channel context, attachment type, board item target, and creation timestamp, which a fused system would keep to preserve the channel-to-board link.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file linking dragnet-development attachment att-364988f3 to board item d6cdf466 with a 2026-06-24 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a dragnet-development channel artifact is attached to board item d6cdf466.
